title: Path Run Meter
problem: Mission Glance compressed lane status, but the first cockpit viewport still needed a clearer game-HUD readout for route, gates, proof, tasks, and notes.
implementation: Added renderPathMissionRunMeter to turn Mission Glance cards into a five-socket level strip.
Inserted the meter into the Mission Glance copy column so it improves the first viewport without adding another panel.
Styled route, gate, proof, task, and note sockets with tone-aware states, progress track, reduced-motion handling, and compact labels.
Updated cache keys, README documentation, and a focused contract test.

references.label: Habitica
references.note: Used as a lightweight reference for translating real tasks into RPG-like levels, rewards, and status.

references.label: Visual workflow dashboards research
references.note: Used as a reminder that visual dashboards should expose task state, urgency, and traceability rather than only decoration.

verification.result: RED failed before implementation because renderPathMissionRunMeter did not exist

nextAction: Continue replacing text-heavy first-viewport status with compact game HUD controls while keeping deeper history behind deliberate depth switches.
